roa.docketEntryComment: PROBATION UPDATED PER AB1950, PROBATION EXPIRED 09-25-2020
APD'S MOTION TO REQUEST RESTITUTION HEARING - FILED
/CAL:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/X:PARTIES STIPULATE TO A RESTIUTUTION AMOUNT OF $750 PAYABLE TO VICTIM JOHN REID/X:A CR-110 & 111 ARE SIGNED, FILED& SERVED/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/AMEND:1 & 2/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST &CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 1 & 2/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:09-26-18/PPRF/REMA/ARBUCKLE/TWS/DOP/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENDANT NO LONGER BE ON GPS MONITORING/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX:09-14-18/987,2/OR/DEF:IS ORDERED RELEASED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH (A GPS DEVICE, SCRAM DEVICE, OR GPS AND SCRAM DEVICE) AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLYWITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON MONDAY 07-09-18 AT NOON,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SAORD/SA2:68 BELCHER & 100 BRODERICK STREETS IN SAN FRANCISCO, CA/SAORD3/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:APD RESTITUTION REPORT/DAWT/X:(REST $750 TO REID)/CONTD:TO SET REST HRG/DOPU:COUNSEL WITH AUTHORITY TO ACCEPT RESTITUTION/
